description: A store is subscribed manually without unsubscribing, leaking callbacks across navigations.
body: Failure mode: a component calls store.subscribe directly and never calls the returned unsubscribe, so every time the component mounts a new subscription is added and old ones keep firing after destroy, leaking memory and duplicating side effects. Detection signals: callbacks run more times than mounted components; memory grows across SPA navigations; subscribe is called without capturing its return. Do not manually subscribe in a component when $store auto-subscription works. Safer fallback: use the $store syntax which unsubscribes on destroy, or capture the unsubscribe and call it in onDestroy / an $effect cleanup return.
